name: purview-sentinel
notes: Sentinel integration lab: ships Purview signals into a Log Analytics workspace with Sentinel onboarded.
Requires an Azure subscription (this is the only lab profile that provisions Azure resources).
Defender portal unified SecOps is the Microsoft-recommended SIEM experience post July 2025 — see RUNBOOK.

testUsers.note: Seed accounts for generating DLP/IRM signal traffic.

sensitivityLabels.note: Single Confidential label for label-downgrade analytics rule.

dlp.note: SSN-detecting policy to generate Sentinel SecurityAlert rows via Defender XDR.

insiderRisk.note: Data-leaks IRM policy. Requires SIEM export toggled on in Purview settings to flow alerts to Sentinel.

auditConfig.note: Saved audit searches for DLP rule match correlation.

sentinelIntegration.note: Provisions Azure resource group, Log Analytics workspace, Sentinel onboarding, data connectors, analytics rules, workbook, playbook.

testData.note: Seed emails to trigger DLP → Sentinel signal flow.
